handle_loop · receive detok result and write back
greedy / top-k / top-p / temperature / min-p · sampling/sampling_batch_info.py
Maintain DecodeStatus by rid, handle tokenizer decode
prefix-aware state to avoid full re-decoding each step
Read read_offset / surr_offset, decode only new tokens
Strip leading spaces / utf-8 boundary surrogates;
async out_queue → stream yield to HTTP
ZMQ PUSH → tokenizer_ipc BatchStrOut ←────────── Return Path
Dispatched on demand by Attention Backend / FusedMoE / Sampler; bucket shapes bound at JIT compile time
Write to MHA/MLA Token KV Pool
Scatter update at end of Forward
Allocates slots in tandem with out_cache_loc
Extensions Sidebar (opt-in; hooks into Scheduler / Forward / Sampler at runtime)
Non-default features · each has its own config entrypoint and Cache; does not affect the minimum-viable main pipeline
• EAGLE3 / MTP Draft model accelerates AR generation
• Draft many tokens, target verifies once
• Near N× throughput when accept rate is high
• Dynamically load multiple Adapters, switch per request
• Shared base weights + independent A/B low-rank
• Linear is converted to quantized_matmul backend
• mimo_v2_pro integrated with Fused QKV + FP8
• JSON Schema / Regex / EBNF grammar constraints
• Vocab bitmask forcibly masks invalid tokens
• Sampler stage applies mask then samples
• Pass tool_calls through to API response
Legend: ● Blue=Attention/Compute ● Yellow=Linear/MoE/Quant ● Purple=KV/Spec ● Green=Optional Extensions ● Red=ZMQ IPC ● Dark=Code/Data samples
MemoryPools (memory_pool.py) · pytree container; unifies replace_buffer / syncs lifecycle across pools
• MHATokenToKVPool — default MHA / GQA actual K/V pool
• SWAKVPool — Sliding Window local window KV
• RecurrentStatePool — KDA / Mamba / GDN linear recurrent
Write: update_kv_cache Pallas kernel scatter-updates at end of Forward;
Prefix tree reuses computed KV; Radix nodes share common prefixes
For Sliding Window models: nodes with LRU + window boundary awareness
No prefix reuse; chunk-based cache only; --disable-radix-cache / some SWA
In-page alignment: page_size · hit rate determined by RadixCache.match_prefix
